crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Heartbeat: check time (PST). Quick checks — (1) git log --oneline -5 for clearpath, lifecycle-killer, nonprofit-hub, note new commits. (2) Check Clearpath fireflies_meetings for last 2h, send Telegram summary to 6690120787 if new. (3) If briefing due and not sent today, dispatch it to a background Agent so the main session stays responsive for Telegram. Use background agents for any heavy data pulls (Gmail, Calendar). Otherwise HEARTBEAT_OK.

crons.name: meeting-prep
crons.prompt: Meeting Prep Briefing (Clearpath-powered): Check Google Calendar for tomorrow's meetings (Monday's if today is Friday). For each meeting with external attendees: (1) Call POST https://clrpath.ai/api/briefings/generate with X-Api-Key header from .env CLEARPATH_API_KEY, body: {"personName":"attendee name","organization":"their org","meetingDate":"YYYY-MM-DD","meetingTime":"HH:MM"} — parse SSE response for briefingId. (2) Get the Google Calendar event link (htmlLink from the event). (3) Send Telegram summary to 6690120787 with format: meeting time, attendee, org, 1-line context, Clearpath briefing link (https://clrpath.ai/briefings/{briefingId}), and calendar event link. Skip internal-only blocks. If no external meetings, send 'No external meetings tomorrow.'
